detail.description:
1. Dot graphic action
Cute dot characters and spectacular action! Enjoy immersive battles in a world of dot graphics.

2. Skill Chain System
Collect and connect skill blocks to kill enemies with more powerful attacks. Enjoy the fun of easy but strategic battles!

3. Job change system
You can receive new skills and special costumes for free by changing jobs! Transform into a more powerful character after changing jobs!

4. Magic Tower
Climb the magic tower and earn rich rewards! Defeat increasing
